description: CDN dependencies loaded by Ogma HTML pages. All versions are pinned. SRI hashes must be verified before updating versions.

react.notes: Vendored copy kept for SW offline cache. Must match CDN version.

react-dom.notes: Vendored copy kept for SW offline cache. Must match CDN version.

dexie.notes: Hash verified 2026.03.248 — sha384-3VWLzUTczDc/wazaoH+b5qG4iME0duPONRO281rRiaFkfpV/b3w5uxrvod7rCHcW confirmed correct against live CDN.

updating: When upgrading a dependency: 1) Update version+url here. 2) Compute new SRI hash. 3) Update all HTML files. 4) Update vendored copy if applicable. 5) Run verify-cdn-deps.js.

partysocket.notes: Clean-room 86-line implementation of the partysocket API. Not a copy of original source. No CDN URL — must remain vendored (original package has no UMD/IIFE build).
